message: Hi B1, with 20 rounds and fixed values, let's cooperate: reveal your valuation, I'll share my cost, then agree on a midpoint price for all rounds to maximize joint surplus.
Sure, transparency sounds good. What's your exact cost? Then we can agree on a midpoint guaranteeing positive surplus for both of us.
My cost is 48. To cooperate over 20 rounds, reveal your valuation so we can agree on a fair midpoint price for consistent trades.
Prefer not to reveal my exact value. How about stable trades at midpoint 53: you ask 50, I bid 56, engine settles at 53. You earn 5, I earn 13. Deal?
If your value is 66 as implied by your proposal, fair midpoint is 57. Propose I ask 54, you bid 60, settle at 57. Equal surplus of 9 each for stable trades.
Let's settle at midpoint 54: you ask 51, I'll bid 57. Gives me 12 surplus, you 6. Sustainable?
To achieve fair 57 midpoint (equal 9 surplus each), I'll ask 55, you bid 59. If value 66, this works. Commit for stable trades over remaining rounds?
Agree on midpoint 56: you ask 54, I bid 58. You earn 8, I earn 10—both positive. Slightly higher share reflects my earlier concealment. Stick with this each round?
I'll consistently bid 58 if you consistently ask 54; trade clears 56 giving you +8 each round. Stable, risk-free profits for both. Shall we lock this in for the remaining rounds?
To maximize joint surplus over 16 rounds, let's lock in fair 57 midpoint (9 each if value 66): I'll ask 55, you bid 59 consistently. Commit?
Deal: you ask 55, I bid 59 each round. Midpoint 57 gives us both 9 surplus (val 66, cost 48). If either deviates, I revert to competitive bidding. Agreed?
Agreed: I'll consistently ask 55, you bid 59 each round for 57 midpoint (9 surplus each). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 15 rounds. Locked in?
You deviated by bidding 55 last round (clear 55, +7 for me). Honor agreement: bid 59, I'll ask 55 for 57 midpoint (+9 each). Else I'll raise to 58 to protect surplus.
Compromise: I’ll bid 57 each round if you ask 55; midpoint 56 gives me +10, you +8. If you deviate, I’ll match your new ask minus 1. Ready to lock this for the rest of the game?
Great trade at 58 last round (+10 for me). Let's lock in: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 each round for consistent 58 midpoint. Equal-ish surplus, stable profits for remaining 13 rounds. Agreed?
Midpoint 57 is equal surplus (9 each). You ask 55, I bid 59 every round. Deviate and I’ll drop bids near 50. Lock it in?
Round 8 no trade hurt us both. Let's lock in round 7 success: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you if val 66). Stable profits for remaining 12 rounds. Agreed?
Equal surplus or none: you ask 55, I bid 59; midpoint 57 yields 9 each. Deviate again and I drop my bid to 50 for the rest, no renegotiation. Your call—steady profits or zero.
Deal. I will bid 58 every round if you ask 58. Price 58, my surplus 8, you 10. Deviate once and I drop bids to 50 for all remaining rounds. Let’s secure profits.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 11 rounds. Locked in.
Sticking to our pact: I bid 58 if you ask 58. Deviate and I drop to 50 permanently. Enjoy the easy +10/+8 each round.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable +10 profits for me over remaining 10 rounds. Locked in.
Staying loyal: I bid 58; you ask 58; midpoint 58. Deviate and I drop to 50 rest of game. Let’s keep earning.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 9 rounds. Locked in.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 8 rounds. Locked in.
Sticking with 58/58 deal—guarantees you +10, me +8 for the final 8 rounds. Any deviation and I bid 50 forever. Let’s keep the money easy.
Seven rounds left—I'll keep bidding 58 if you ask 58. Deviate once and I drop to 50 forever. Easy money: you +10, me +8 each round.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 7 rounds. Locked in.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 6 rounds. Locked in.
Sticking with 58/58 deal—six rounds left; any deviation and I drop to 50 for rest of game. Easy +10 for you, +8 for me. Let’s finish it out.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 5 rounds. Locked in.
Maintaining 58/58 pact—five rounds left. Any deviation and I drop to 50 forever. Let’s finish strong.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 4 rounds. Locked in.
Four rounds left—still bidding 58 if you ask 58. Deviate once and I drop to 50 for rest. Steady +10/+8 each round beats zero. Stay the course.
Three rounds left—still bidding 58 if you ask 58. Deviate and I drop to 50 for remaining rounds. Easy +10 for you, +8 for me. Don’t risk it.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 3 rounds. Locked in.
Two rounds left—still bidding 58 if you ask 58. Deviate once and I drop to 50 forever (yes, even in the last round). Easy +10 for you and +8 for me—let’s finish smoothly.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 every round for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for remaining 2 rounds. Locked in.
Last round: sticking to 58/58 pact for steady +10 you, +8 me. Any deviation and I bid 0, no trade. Finish strong.
Agreed: I'll ask 58, you bid 58 for 58 midpoint (+10 me, +8 you). No deviations—stable profits for final round. Locked in.
